hero.title: A governed source of truth — for your team and your AI.
hero.description: Curate, review and publish trusted knowledge, then serve it to your agents over MCP and the API — with every change on the record.

lifecycle.label: Draft → review → publish
lifecycle.hint: A governed lifecycle for every item

tenant.label: Tenant-isolated
tenant.hint: Each organization sees only its own knowledge

audited.label: Fully audited
audited.hint: Every change is on the record

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back — sign in to your console.

done.title: Your account is active.
done.description: You can now sign in with your new password.

notFound.title: Invitation not found
notFound.description: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used. Ask an administrator to send a new one.

invitation.title: Accept your invitation
invitation.description: Set a password to activate your account, then sign in.

validation.tooShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
